ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable (e.g., X1, X2, X3, X4, X5) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the variable */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the variable */,
  "is_control" INTEGER /* Indicates if the variable is a control variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the data point belongs to */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable the data point is for */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp when the data point was recorded */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch to which the data point belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the outcome belongs to */,
  "outcome_value" REAL /* Value of the outcome */,
  "treated" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the experiment was treated */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the outcome value */,
  "statistical_significance" REAL /* P-value or other measure of statistical significance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variable_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable */,
  "role_in_experiment" TEXT /* Role of the variable in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variable_mapping_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variable_mapping_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the note is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_notes_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the analysis is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the analysis */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "software_used" TEXT /* Software or tool used for the analysis */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
